name: xstockstrat — Ingest Signal (Manual CSV Upload)

nodes.name: CSV Input
nodes.notes: Replace csv_content with your actual CSV data. Columns: source,symbol,direction,conviction,valid_from,valid_until,headline,raw_url,tags (semicolon-separated tags).

nodes.name: POST Each Signal
nodes.notes: Sends each signal as a separate HTTP POST. n8n processes each item from the CSV parse node individually.

notes: Manual workflow for bulk-ingesting newsletter signals from a CSV. Paste CSV content into the 'CSV Input' node. Column format: source,symbol,direction,conviction,valid_from,valid_until,headline,raw_url,tags (tags semicolon-separated). Each row becomes one IngestSignal call. For the gRPC NormalizeRawData path see x-add-data-source.md Part 2 Option C.
